changeSet.author: statstracker
changeSet.comment: Create match table if not exists
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS match ( match_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, map VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, played_at DATE NOT NULL, team1_score INT NOT NULL, team2_score INT NOT NULL )

changeSet.author: statstracker
changeSet.comment: Extend player_match_stats with match_id, team, damage columns if not exists

changeSet.author: statstracker
changeSet.comment: Add FK from player_match_stats to match if not exists
